transfer_interest_headline_bid_rejected: Kulübün başka bir teklifi reddetmesinden rahatsız
transfer_interest_headline_bigger: Daha büyük bir kulüpten somut ilgi
transfer_interest_headline_homecoming: Olası bir eve dönüş dikkatini çekti
transfer_interest_headline_homecoming_na: {club} ile olası eve dönüş dikkatini çekti
transfer_interest_headline_leverage: Dış ilgiyi sözleşmede koz olarak kullandı
transfer_interest_kind_big_league_opport: Transfer daha büyük bir lige adım atmak olurdu.
transfer_interest_kind_escape_route: Mevcut durumdan bir çıkış yolu olurdu.
transfer_interest_kind_step_down_with_mi: Daha küçük kulüp ama daha fazla dakika.
transfer_interest_kind_step_up: Transfer net bir adım yukarı olurdu.
transfer_interest_reaction_cautious: Somut bir şey gelene kadar temkinli.
transfer_interest_reaction_uses_interest: İlgiyi sözleşmede koz olarak kullanmayı düşünüyor.
transfer_interest_reaction_wants_bid_acc: Ciddi bir teklif kabul edilsin istiyor.
transfer_interest_reaction_wants_talks: Ciddi bir teklif gelirse kulübün kulak vermesini istiyor.
transfer_interest_source_scout_attendanc: Tekrarlayan gözlemci ziyaretleriyle gün yüzüne çıktı.
transfer_sporting_fit_bigger_club_but_ha: Daha büyük kulüp ama dakika almak zor olurdu.
transfer_sporting_fit_financial_fit_only: Çoğunlukla finansal, sportif olarak daha az uyum.
workers_remote_setup_lead_1: Uzak çalışan tanımlı değil. Şuraya girdiler ekleyin:
event_asked_for_private_talk: Asked the manager for a private conversation
event_encouraged_by_squad_investment: Encouraged by the club's squad investment
event_benched_for_big_match: Hurt by being benched for a big match
event_threatened_by_new_signing: Worried by competition from a new signing
contract_reason_offer_rejected_by_player: He turned down the club's offer.
contract_evidence_rejected_over_wage: The wage was below his expectations.
contract_evidence_rejected_over_role: The offered role did not match his expectations.
contract_evidence_rejected_over_release_: The deal lacked the release clause he wanted.
contract_evidence_rejected_over_length: The contract length did not suit him.
contract_evidence_rejected_over_ambition: The club's project did not match his ambition.
private_talk_reason_playing_time: He is unhappy about his playing time.
private_talk_reason_contract: He has unresolved concerns over his contract.
private_talk_reason_transfer_status: He wants clarity over his transfer status.
private_talk_reason_captaincy_or_status: He has concerns about his role and standing in the squad.
private_talk_reason_tactical_role: He cannot continue in his current tactical role.
private_talk_reason_manager_relationship: His relationship with the manager has soured.
club_direction_evidence_key_player_sold: A key teammate was sold and not replaced.
club_direction_evidence_squad_weakened: The squad has been visibly weakened.
club_direction_evidence_poor_league_form: The team's league form has been disappointing.
club_direction_evidence_ambition_gap: He doubts the board's stated ambition.
club_direction_evidence_meaningful_signi: A meaningful signing arrived this window.
club_direction_evidence_multiple_signing: Several quality additions have improved the squad.
club_direction_evidence_board_investment: The board's visible investment is a positive signal.
club_direction_evidence_player_involved: He feels involved in the club's project.
club_direction_evidence_high_ambition: His high ambition amplifies how he reads the direction.
club_direction_evidence_high_influence: As a senior figure he weighs the club's direction heavily.
big_match_decision_started_trusted: The manager trusted him with the start.
big_match_decision_benched: The manager left him out of the starting XI.
sub_frustration_kind_repeated_early: He has been hooked early again and is bristling at the pattern.
sub_frustration_kind_hooked_while_playin: He was substituted while playing well.
sub_frustration_kind_removed_big_match: He was pulled off early in a major fixture.
sub_frustration_kind_tactical_swap: A tactical swap left him unhappy with how he was used.
new_signing_threat_same_position: The new arrival plays in his exact position.
new_signing_threat_similar_status: The signing was bought with a similar squad-status tier in mind.
new_signing_threat_higher_ability: The new arrival has visibly higher ability.
new_signing_threat_larger_wage: The newcomer is on a much larger wage deal.
new_signing_threat_younger: A much younger rival has arrived in his position.
new_signing_threat_already_fringe: He was already short on minutes before the signing arrived.
private_talk_trust_mid: His relationship with the manager is steady but tense.
private_talk_trust_high: Manager trust is high — he expects a fair hearing.
private_talk_repeat_note: He has already raised this with the manager recently.
club_direction_net_signings_strong: The board has clearly backed this transfer window.
club_direction_net_signings_negative: More senior players have left than arrived this window.
club_direction_net_signings_flat: The window has been quiet, neither strengthened nor weakened.
big_match_amplifier_hot_form_dropped: He was hooked despite a hot recent run of form.
big_match_amplifier_young_or_fringe: A fringe / young player getting the nod feels the trust more.
sub_frustration_repeat_note: He has been hooked early repeatedly in recent weeks.
